name: Rioja Red Wine Vinaigrette (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Reduce the rioja red wine in a saucepan until it reaches a syrup consistency.
2. In a food processor, combine the reduced red wine and Dijon mustard.
3. With the motor running, slowly add the olive oil to the food processor until the mixture is emulsified.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Serve drizzled over lamb skewers.
